title: [ExportVerilog][Verif] 'verif.assert' op emission to Verilog not supported

features.name: assert statement with sequence operand
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog assert statement that takes a sequence expression as its condition

features.name: assert statement with property operand
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog assert statement that takes a property expression as its condition

features.name: sequence definition with clock and expression
features.description: Code should include a sequence definition with a clocking event and boolean expression

features.name: property definition with clock and expression
features.description: Code should include a property definition with a clocking event and property expression

features.name: ltl implication operation in module
features.description: Code should include LTL implication operations used within verification assertions

features.name: ltl delay operation in verification
features.description: Code should include LTL delay operations used in sequence or property definitions

features.name: ltl binary operations and not in verification
features.description: Code should include LTL binary operations (or, and) and not operations used in verification contexts
features.snippet:
ltl.or %b, %3 : i1, !ltl.property
ltl.and %b, %4 : i1, !ltl.sequence
ltl.not %b : i1

features.name: assert within hw module
features.description: Code should include an assert statement inside a hardware module definition
